title: panicum rigidulum subsp. elongatum
intro: Panicum rigidulum subsp. elongatum, also known as Blue Panic Grass, is a type of grass native to Africa and parts of Asia, characterized by its blue-green foliage and tall, slender stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blue Panic Grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of fever and rheumatism. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
